title: iridaceae
intro: The rank of Iridaceae refers to a family of flowering plants. This family is commonly known as the iris family and is characterized by its wide range of colorful and showy flowers. The Iridaceae family consists of approximately 65 genera and around 2000 species, making it a diverse and widespread group of plants. Many species within this family are native to temperate regions of the Northern Hemisphere, but they can be found in various parts of the world, including Africa, Asia, and the Americas.
